2) soft_constraints:

3) task_decomposition:

   b) Explore Better Insurance Options:

   c) Group Travel Insurance for Thailand Trip:

      - Ask the external insurance agent about available group travel insurance options with rates and coverage details for the trip spanning June 10-17.
   d) Overall Budget Calculation:
      - Add health coverage, property coverage (if applicable), travel coverage, and any additional enhancement services to form a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown.

4) data_planning:

       • Any existing details on property coverage: home and contents insurance (if available and applicable).
       • History of previous travel insurance if available.
       • Information on the group size for the Thailand trip (needs confirmation of number of participants: at least the user and Alice Smith).

Final Steps:

       • property_coverage details with cost (if applicable),
       • travel_coverage as group travel insurance details for the trip (cost and benefits),
       • additional_services with any enhancement options and their costs,
       • total_budget breakdown (monthly and/or annually).
</initial_plan>

For your Thailand scuba diving trip group travel insurance (June 10-17), I recommend our premium option that is well-suited for adventurous trips and offers robust comprehensive coverage. Here are the complete details for the plan:

Group Travel Insurance Option – PrimeTravel Premium Plan:
• Rate: €115/month per traveler. For a group of at least two (e.g., you and Alice Smith), each traveler will be charged this amount.
• Coverage Specifics:
   – Medical Coverage: Includes extensive emergency medical care, worldwide hospital access, and coverage for unexpected medical treatment costs.
   – Trip Cancellation/Interruption: Provides reimbursement for pre-paid non-refundable expenses if your trip is canceled or interrupted for covered reasons.
   – Emergency Assistance Services: 24/7 global support including medical evacuation, trip delay support, and assistance with lost luggage or travel documents.
• Additional Benefits:
   – Priority customer support and dedicated travel assistance.
   – Enhanced protection for adventure activities, which is ideal for scuba diving.
